news.summary: Shortly before the Federal Reserve's June policy meeting, President Donald Trump criticized Fed Chair Jerome Powell and avoided confirming a potential U.S. military strike on Iran. Trump urged for significantly lower interest rates, stating that the U.S. should be "two to two and a half points lower" due to low inflation. Speaking outside the White House, he blamed Powell for the high refinancing costs of U.S. debt, suggesting a one-point rate reduction would provide relief, saving billions in the long term. Trump accuses Powell of resisting rate cuts, claiming that a two-point decrease could save trillions over time. The details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Trump criticizes Powell over interest rates, urging for a 2-2.5% cut, claiming it could save trillions for U.S. Refers to Powell as someone who "refuses to lower the Fed". Iran rejects Trump's demands for a military strike.

news.summary: In Gravette, Arkansas, a grand opening celebration for Spavinaw Creek Senior Housing, an affordable housing development, will take place on June 24, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. Representatives from the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) and Arvest Bank will be in attendance alongside city dignitaries and members of Upward Housing. The construction of this $7.3 million rental complex was made possible in part by a $1 million Affordable Housing Program (AHP) grant awarded to Upward Housing by FHLB Dallas and Arvest Bank.
news.headline: Grand opening celebration for Spavinaw Creek Senior Housing in Gravette, Arkansas with $1M grant from FHLB Dallas & Arvest Bank for $7.3M rental complex.

news.summary: The European Central Bank (ECB) revealed a 40% surge in demand for Euro-denominated international bonds and loans in 2024, reaching levels not seen since the global financial crisis. The value of Euro-denominated bonds issued by US firms, known as "Reverse Yankees," increased to nearly $95 billion from $60 billion in 2023. This rise was fueled by firms seeking cheaper capital due to a growing interest rate disparity across the Atlantic. ECB President Christine Lagarde highlighted a link between global trade invoicing shifts, geopolitical alignments, and challenges to the Euro's international role posed by initiatives promoting cryptocurrencies. Despite this surge in international finance, the Euro has lost its position as the second-largest foreign reserve asset, with gold now taking its place due to increased global mistrust of fiat currencies. Central banks doubled their gold purchases in 2024, driving global reserves to 20%, compared to the Euro's 16%. The ECB has responded to Eurozone inflation of 1.9% by halving its benchmark rate to 2% over the past year. Services inflation has reduced from 4% to 3.2%, while goods inflation remains low at 0.6%. The ECB's policy focus is on cutting rates and promoting growth. Geopolitical tensions have increased fiscal deficit risks, with initiatives like Readiness 2030 involving €800 billion in defense spending.
news.headline: ECB notes 40% rise in Euro-denominated bonds and loans in 2024, with Euro-denominated bonds issued by US firms surging to $95B. Euro loses second place to gold as foreign reserve asset due to global mistrust of fiat currencies. ECB cuts benchmark rate to 2% to address Eurozone inflation at 1.9%. Geopolitical tensions fuel demand for gold amid fiscal deficits and monetary debasement.

news.summary: Ivy Fertility, a renowned network of fertility clinics, is pleased to endorse a novel Reproductive Endocrinology and Infertility fellowship program launched by Fertility Associates of Memphis in collaboration with the Graduate Medical Education program at the University of Tennessee Health Sciences Center. This initiative is aimed at broadening the scope of physician training in a region that has traditionally lacked ample fertility specialists. Currently, there are less than 75 infertility physicians in the area.
news.headline: Ivy Fertility supports new fellowship in Reproductive Endocrinology and Infertility in Memphis with University of Tennessee, aiming to address shortage in specialist training.

This development could pave the way for Bitcoin's price to move towards new all-time highs. news.summary: China has allocated a substantial $14 million investment towards utilizing artificial intelligence (AI) technology in the restoration of 100 iconic kung fu films. This initiative aims to bring back to life classic movies starring legendary martial artists like Bruce Lee and Jackie Chan. By revitalizing these films, China seeks to enhance their global cultural impact and preserve the rich history of kung fu cinema.
news.headline: China invests $14M in AI to restore 100 classic kung fu films, including Bruce Lee & Jackie Chan movies for global audience.

news.summary: In the latest data release, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, which is the lowest it has been in the last five years. The number of unemployed individuals in the workforce has decreased by 200,000 compared to the previous year. Additionally, the report highlighted an increase in job creation, with over 300,000 new jobs added in various sectors. The positive trend in the labor market has been attributed to the government's economic policies and initiatives aimed at boosting employment opportunities. Moreover, the average hourly wage saw a 3.5% growth, indicating improved earning potential for workers. Experts predict continued growth and stability in the job market based on these promising indicators.
news.headline: Food waste app, Too Good To Go, reportedly considers securing €300M funding. #startup #investment

news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the Switzerland Construction Market has been recently released, offering insights into the sector. The report indicates that the Swiss construction industry is projected to expand by 1.8% in real terms by 2025. This growth is attributed to investments in affordable housing driven by decreased interest rates, as well as advancements in renewable energy and transportation infrastructure. The report, available through ResearchAndMarkets.com, delves into various sectors including Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential markets, providing analysis and trends up to 2029. This data is crucial for understanding the landscape and potential opportunities in the Swiss construction industry.
news.headline: Switzerland Construction Industry to grow by 1.8% in 2025, driven by government investments in transport, housing, and energy projects.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached an all-time high of 14.7%, marking a significant increase from the previous month's rate of 3.5%. This surge in unemployment has resulted in over 20 million people losing their jobs in the last month alone. The impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on the economy is being cited as the primary cause of this unprecedented rise in job losses. The government is facing increasing pressure to implement measures to support those who have been affected by the economic downturn. Efforts are being made to provide financial aid and create job opportunities to mitigate the adverse effects of the current situation. The coming months will be crucial in determining how the country navigates through this challenging period.
news.headline: Circle receives its first buy rating after Senate approves stablecoin bill. Stocks surge by 8%.

news.summary: The Sixth Qingdao Multinationals Summit (QMS) recently took place in Qingdao, China from June 18th to 20th. During the summit, 40 significant foreign-funded and trade projects were signed, totaling $5.93 billion.
news.headline: 6th Qingdao Multinationals Summit closes with $5.93b deals; 40 agreements signed.

news.summary: Christopher J. Waller, appointed by President Trump, emphasized the importance of the central bank not delaying action until the labor market weakens.
news.headline: Trump-appointed Fed Governor Waller urges rate cuts by July, advocating not to wait for labor market deterioration.

news.summary: Arkadiy Amiryan, the COO of Veles Finance, stated that amid the rise of algorithmic trading in unpredictable crypto markets, it is crucial for developers and users to reevaluate their expectations of artificial intelligence (AI). In an interview with Benzinga, Amiryan emphasized that AI is not a one-size-fits-all solution for all challenges in cryptocurrency trading. He urged for a cautious and knowledgeable approach to automation, stressing the need for a balance between automation and user responsibility, especially as regulatory measures tighten in the volatile crypto sector. Despite the widespread integration of AI in various aspects of daily life, Amiryan reminded that it cannot resolve every issue, underlining the importance of adopting a critical mindset. While some platforms are pursuing fully automated systems, Veles Finance prioritizes a human-centric approach. Regulatory scrutiny in the crypto market is escalating, and Amiryan suggests that a critical outlook is essential.
news.headline: Veles Finance COO warns against blind faith in crypto automation, says AI won't fix all problems. Importance of critical approach highlighted amidst rising regulatory scrutiny.

news.summary: A prominent European hub specializing in investment technologies and financial engineering, Mind Money (CIF license 115/10), will be participating alongside more than 1,500 key figures in the industry at IMpower FundForum 2025 in Monaco. The gathering is set to be held this week at the Grimaldi Forum.
news.headline: Mind Money joins IMpower 2025 with 1,500+ leaders at FundForum, Monaco. European investment tech & finance center.

news.summary: A resident of Smithfield, NSW, Australia, shared his inspiration for creating the MAJIC MIRROR, an innovative blend of technology and fashion to enhance the shopping experience. The inventor believed there was a need for a solution that would streamline the process of trying on clothes, leading to the creation of this cutting-edge mirror design. The MAJIC MIRROR aims to revolutionize shopping by making it quicker and more efficient for consumers, offering a unique approach to integrating technology into the fashion industry. The invention has garnered attention for its potential to transform the retail sector and improve the overall shopping experience, receiving positive feedback for its ingenuity and practicality.
news.headline: Inventor from Australia creates MAJIC MIRROR to revolutionize shopping with technology and fashion; Pittsburg, June 20, 2025.

A self-custodial cryptocurrency platform informed Decrypt about this development, emphasizing the efficiency and speed of transactions possible through blockchain. This advancement allows for continuous trading opportunities and near-instantaneous settlement of trades, revolutionizing the traditional financial landscape.
news.headline: Tokenized assets democratize equity access, bringing Wall Street to blockchain for 24/7 trading and rapid settlements.

news.summary: Today in Basel, Roche unveiled the outcomes of the SUNMO study, Phase III, involving NCT05171647, which displayed that Lunsumio® (mosunetuzumab) delivered subcutaneously alongside Polivy® (polatuzumab vedotin) exhibited a noteworthy improvement in the primary measures of progression-free survival (PFS) and objective response rate (ORR) when compared to MabThera®/Rituxan® (rituximab), gemcitabine, and oxaliplatin (R-GemOx) in individuals with relapsed or refractory (R/R) large B-cell lymphoma (LBCL) ineligible for transplant. Data from the primary analysis were spotlighted at the 18th International Conference on Malignant Lymphoma as a late-breaking oral presentation. The company's stock is listed under SIX: RO, ROG, and OTCQX: RHHBY.
news.headline: Roche study shows Lunsumio & Polivy combo extends remission for large B-cell lymphoma patients;  significant PFS & ORR improvement vs current treatment.

news.summary: Cessie C. Communications, a top boutique PR and social media influencer marketing firm focusing on luxury travel, hospitality, and lifestyle, has been appointed as the official U.S. public relations agency for the Nevis Tourism Authority (NTA). This announcement marks a significant partnership in which Cessie C. Communications will represent NTA in the U.S. market. The agency's expertise in PR and social media will be instrumental in promoting Nevis as a premier tourist destination. The collaboration is set to boost Nevis's visibility and attract more visitors from the U.S. to the island, bolstering its tourism sector.
news.headline: Cessie C. Communications named PR agency for Nevis Tourism Authority in the US, specializing in luxury travel.

news.summary: On June 22, people worldwide are encouraged to celebrate International Being You Day, a global initiative promoting self-acceptance during challenging times. Amidst growing uncertainty, stress, and societal standards, this campaign emphasizes the importance of embracing one's true self. This year, Houston will play a significant role in commemorating the event, which aims to inspire individuals to acknowledge themselves to a global audience. Join the movement and let your unique identity shine on this special day.
news.headline: International Being You Day is approaching on June 22, a day to celebrate individuality in a world full of uncertainty.

news.summary: Little Big Farms™, a revolutionary initiative by From The Land®, is making strides in sustainable agriculture by enabling the growth of five times more food while using 90% less water. The project, based in YUCAIPA, Calif., has been named a finalist at FoodFunded, a prestigious event. This innovative approach is set to revolutionize the farming industry by significantly increasing food production efficiency and reducing water usage.
news.headline: Little Big Farms™ by From The Land® achieves 5X more food production with 90% less water, finalists at FoodFunded event.

news.summary: According to research published in Anesthesia Progress, adopting the ramped body position during general anesthesia for dental procedures can substantially enhance oxygenation and ventilation in patients with severe obesity. The study revealed that patients positioned in the ramped posture experienced noteworthy improvements in pulmonary gas exchange compared to those in the semi-Fowler position. This indicates that the ramped position can greatly benefit patients undergoing anesthesia, particularly those with severe obesity.
news.headline: Study in Anesthesia Progress: Ramped body position boosts oxygenation in obese patients undergoing anesthesia for dental work.

news.summary: Boston-based digital marketing agency, Brick Marketing, recently celebrated its 20th year in business since its establishment in 2005. Over the years, Brick Marketing has served as a reliable partner to hundreds of B2B clients, establishing a strong reputation in the industry.
news.headline: Brick Marketing, a B2B digital marketing agency, celebrates 20 years in business since 2005, based in Boston.

news.summary: In Los Angeles on June 20, 2025, Inner Dimension Yoga, a leading provider of online yoga programs, celebrated a significant achievement by "Sadhana," its year-long program. The program clinched the prestigious Telly Award in the Health, Fitness & Wellness category. This recognition underscores the program's excellence in promoting overall well-being.
news.headline: Inner Dimension Yoga's "Sadhana" program wins Telly Award for Online Wellness Programming, June 20, 2025.

news.summary: A recent report by CobbleStone Software titled "The 2025 State of Contract Management Report" sheds light on the contract management industry's desire for intelligent automation and artificial intelligence to address the prevalent dissatisfaction with existing manual systems. The report, released from Princeton, N.J. on June 20, 2025, highlights a push for technological advancements in contract management to streamline processes and improve efficiency. The findings underscore the urgent need for innovation, with data revealing that a large percentage of professionals are seeking AI solutions to enhance their contract management practices.
news.headline: CobbleStone Software's report highlights industry demand for AI & automation in contract management.

news.summary: Ensure your company's registration on SAM.gov for the Disaster Response Registry is up-to-date as the 2025 Hurricane Season approaches. Based in Clearwater, Fla., on June 20, 2025, the contracting specialists at Federal Contracting Center urge businesses to update their registration to participate in disaster response efforts. It is crucial to act promptly to align with government requirements and take advantage of potential opportunities. Stay informed and proactive to maintain eligibility for federal contracts during crises.
news.headline: Register now for U.S. Govt emergency response contracting. Update SAM.gov for Disaster Response Registry before 2025 Hurricane Season.

news.headline: 25 women named Top Chief Sustainability Officers for 2025 by Women We Admire. NEW YORK, June 20, 2025 - An important step for gender equality in sustainability leadership.

news.summary: In Fargo, North Dakota, LongWater has announced its investment in Valley Lighting, representing the initial deployment of funds from LongWater's first SBIC fund dedicated to the lower middle market.
news.headline: LongWater invests in Valley Lighting, first SBIC fund investment, marking a significant milestone for the company.
